description_long: This is a single low-top sneaker with a tan leather upper, featuring three dark blue stripes on each side, characteristic of Adidas branding. The shoe has a white rubber sole that shows visible signs of wear and dirt, indicating frequent use. The laces are a light gray color, threaded in a standard criss-cross pattern through metal eyelets. The tongue and collar are padded and lined with a light-colored fabric, providing comfort and support. The heel area displays a blue patch with white text, and the tongue has a prominent logo patch. The overall appearance suggests a classic, retro-inspired design with a combination of leather, fabric, and rubber materials.
description: A tan leather sneaker with blue stripes, white sole, and visible signs of wear, featuring classic Adidas branding and a criss-cross lacing style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded toe, criss-cross laces, and the logo patch on the tongue.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the three blue stripes, tan leather upper, and the worn white sole.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the blue heel patch with white text and the slightly scuffed back of the sole.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the blue stripes, tan leather, and visible wear on the sole.
attribute_logo: White trefoil logo on the tongue patch and white text on the blue heel patch.
